subcodes.first_line: The Book hath borne witness to that which the Wronged One hath testified at the beginning and the return. O peoples of the earth, hearken ye [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد شهد الکتاب بما شهد به المظلوم فی المبدء و الماب یا اهل الارض ان استمعوا
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @knowledge; recognition of God, @chastisement and requital, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
